nasb.text: and their relatives according to their generations, 956. All these were heads of fathers’ households according to their fathers’ houses.

esv.text: and their kinsmen according to their generations, 956. All these were heads of fathers’ houses according to their fathers’ houses.

cnv.text: 還有他們的眾親族；按著他們的家譜登記，共有九百五十六人。以上這些人都是他們各家族的首領。

ccb.text: 以及他们的亲族，按家谱的记载共有九百五十六人。以上这些人都是各家的族长。
